creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

After getting close to a conclusion with the originator, it got to 
the point where I can't get feedback. The problem _was_ that the 
partitions weren't mounted. We got him up to the point where 
he could inspect the partitions, but there seemed to be major  
fs corruption that fsck couldn't sort out. I suggested 
newfs and installation, since which point I haven't heard from 
him (18 August).
